prestazioni: Engine code **JLH-3G15TD** (1.5L turbocharged inline-4, direct injection, 177hp stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with **Manley 87mm forged pistons**, **Pauter billet crankshaft**, and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** to handle 400+ hp reliably. Pair with **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger** (0.86 A/R, 62mm compressor, 56mm turbine) on a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold** by **Full-Race Motorsports**, supporting 28-32 psi boost with **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port blow-off valve**.

Fuel system overhaul: **Bosch 1000cc high-impedance injectors** (side-feed, ethanol-compatible) with **Radium Engineering dual-core fuel rail** and **AEM 400LPH in-tank fuel pump** (E85 capable). **Link G4+ Xtreme ECU** standalone management with **AEM CD-7 dash** for real-time monitoring, paired with **Motec M150 ECU** for advanced traction control and launch control via **Haltech CAN keypad**.

Drivetrain reinforcement: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 4.11 final drive ratio) with **PPG 8880-grade 6-speed dog-ring gearset** and **South Bend Clutch Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** (2600lb clamping force). **Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilovers** (24-position rebound, 16-position compression) with **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for chassis rigidity. **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers** (355mm rotors) and **2-piston rear calipers** (330mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (custom-fabricated for Borui GE Turbo, 30mm front fender flares, 40mm rear flares) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (3D-scanned for OEM fitment) and **custom aluminum rear diffuser** (integrated **Aeromotions active rear wing** with 3-position angle adjustment). **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **carbon fiber trunk lid** (with integrated **LED brake light bar**).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels** (ET custom-machined for Borui GE Turbo hubs) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). **AP Racing BBK** (Big Brake Kit) with **gold-anodized calipers** and **custom titanium wheel studs** (12x1.5, 50mm length). **Custom LED headlight retrofit** (Hella 55W Bi-Xenon projectors, **Morimoto XB35 LED bulbs**) with **RGB halo DRLs** (controlled via **AEM CD-7**).

**Full interior weight reduction**: **Recaro SPG XL seats** (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses) with **custom aluminum rear seat delete panel** (integrated **Fire Extinguisher System** by **Lifeline USA**). **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (350mm, suede, quick-release hub) with **NRG short shifter** (50% reduction). **Custom roll cage** (TIG-welded, **Chromoly 4130**, 8-point, integrated **OMP fire suppression system**) with **carbon fiber door cards** (retaining OEM switches, **AEM CD-7 mount**). **Full Alcantara headliner** (custom-patterned) with **LED ambient lighting** (RGB, **Philips Hue integration**).
